_comment: AERO (Aerodrome Finance) claim records. DRAFT — review is 'pending', so verify.js ignores these and they have ZERO effect on the published grade until a human flips review to 'approved' in a reviewed PR. Before approving: open the source URL and confirm the quote is verbatim, then confirm on-chain that the disclosed powers still cover every privileged selector Assay found. Approving the admin_disclosure claim below is expected to lift AERO's disclosure dimension and clear the claim-light cap; see docs/reviews/UR-AERO-2026-07.md for the coupled Under-Review decision.

claims.text: Aerodrome documents that AERO's only privileged capability is minting, held by the Minter contract for weekly gauge emissions and rebases.
claims.quote: Can mint AERO and distribute to Voter for gauge emissions and RewardsDistributor for claimable rebases
